case_title: BUTCHERSHOP CREATIVE LLC VS. CREATIVE FOOD CONCEPTS INC.
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER BUTCHERSHOP CREATIVE LLC AS TO RESPONDENT CREATIVE FOOD CONCEPTS INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PETITIONER BUTCHERSHOP CREATIVE LLC
ORDER (GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER BUTCHERSHOP CREATIVE LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CREATIVE FOOD CONCEPTS INC. $200,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200,000.00, PLUS INTEREST AT 10% PER ANNUM FROM JUNE 1, 2018, REDUCED BY ALL FUNDS RECEIVED BY PETITIONER - SEE SCANNED DOC

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGEMENT BY STIPULATION FILED BY PETITIONER BUTCHERSHOP CREATIVE LLC
